For years I’ve had this lofty idea in my head about a machine learning (ML) framework that could upset the dominant ML paradigm, moving us from rigid black box models that scale through mindless complexity, to dynamically structured models that improve our understanding of the processes underlying our data. And, In the past couple of months we’ve had some mathematical breakthroughs that have allowed me to really believe for the first time that this might just not be a pipe dream. So, Redpoll is in focus mode. There is a still a lot of research to do before we take over the world, but we’ve got a roadmap to spin out products that allow us to validate the underlying ML framework as we go and change the world one step at a time.
...
Plover is our first checkpoint. Plover learns a joint probability distribution over a structurally unaltered relational database to automatically identify, explain, and protect against errors and anomalies. We’ve signed a partnership in the health field and are looking for one or two more (not necessarily in health).

It is a great honor to share the news that Ameren Illinois is ranked number one in customer satisfaction among large electric utility providers in the Midwest according to the J.D. Power 2021 Electric Utility Residential Customer Satisfaction Study. After being near the bottom of this same list 10 years ago, I challenged our team to make a personal commitment to improve the customer experience. We redoubled our efforts to increase reliability and strengthen our system while keeping energy rates stable. We invested in new technology and convenience tools to make it easier for our customers to do business with us. The turnaround is a testament to the hard work of our entire team. To have these efforts validated by our customers is the highest honor we can receive. Congratulations to everyone at Ameren Illinois!
...
The time has come, I get to share my passion project with the world!  I pitched an idea I've had for years to the "Shark Tank" at SSP Innovations, LLC and they decided to let me make a proof of concept. I wanted to use multiple images from a GPS enabled camera taking pictures from a moving car along with a custom trained object detection AI model to quickly/accurately triangulate the positions of overhead electric facilities.  It's great working for a company that's supportive of forward leaning projects like this.

results.title: Whitney Vermillion
highlights:
Senior Data Analyst at [Ameren](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ameren)
...
I build high-impact, data-driven tools, engineering solutions, and metrics for Ameren Missouri’s nuclear power plant. The initiatives I currently support span online operations, refueling outages, and engineering strategy, helping drive operational efficiency and informed decision-making across multiple departments. With a background in Electrical Engineering, a postgraduate certificate in Data Science and Business Analytics, as well as a current post-graduate Computational Intelligence certificate perusal through MS&T, I specialize in bridging the gap between operations, engineering, and data/computational intelligence. I’m experienced in Python, R, SQL, Power BI, SAS, engineering, etc. My projects span digital image processing facial recognition, power plant day ahead market predictions, as well as nuclear power plant engineering dynamic prioritization model framework for plant changes, modifications and resolutions. As stated earlier, I’m currently working toward a certificate in Computational Intelligence and am passionate about using data, technology, and problem-solving to take on complex challenges. Beyond the energy industry, I care deeply about addressing climate change, advancing medical breakthroughs, and rethinking the systems that shape our world. I believe the right ideas, backed by the right data, can change everything.
...

results.title: Substation Design Engineer | Joblume
highlights:
# Substation Design Engineer
...
Posted Jun 19, 2026
...
Full-time

 Ameren Illinois provides electric transmission and distribution service and natural gas distribution service. The Substation Design Engineer is responsible for engineering design, project management, and technical support for projects relating to new and existing Bulk, Distribution, and Customer Substations. Responsibilities Establish basic design parameters, writing and evaluating material and construction specifications, direct drawing preparation, and perform cost/benefit analyses Project management activities including responsibility for overall project cost and scheduling; coordinating activities related to real estate, purchasing, drafting, construction, operating, and related engineering groups associated with projects. The position requires simultaneously handling multiple projects with varying completion dates Technical support activities include providing consulting services to other groups in matters relating to Bulk, Distribution, and Customer Substations With an increased interest in green energy and renewables, engineers will be working with solar and other DER customers on projects that will integrate these new clean energy sources into Ameren's existing grid Skills Bachelor of Science Degree in Electrical or Mechanical Engineering from an accredited college or university required Proficiency in use of computers Good analytical, communication and human relations skills Capacity to work on major project teams Ability to handle and prioritize multiple assignments/projects Completion of Power Option classes as part of college coursework preferred Electrical background (e.g., college coursework or work experience) is preferred Professional Engineer (P.E.) License or active commitment to obtain one is preferred Prefer applicants with Engineer-In-Training (EIT) certification Substation or related equipment design, option or maintenance experience preferred Benefits Medical coverage on date of hire 100% employer paid cash balance pension plan 401(k) with company match fully vested on date of hire Minimum of 15 days paid vacation and 12 paid holidays Paid parental leave and family caregiver leave Company Overview Ameren is a delivery company that specializes in natural gas and electric distribution, as well as electric transmission services. It was founded in 1881, and is headquartered in St Louis, Missouri, USA, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is http://ameren.com. Company H1B Sponsorship Ameren has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 1 in 2026, 8 in 2025, 6 in 2024, 8 in 2023, 15 in 2022, 6 in 2021, 5 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

### SOFTWARE ENGINEER at [AMEREN](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ameren) (Current)

● Owner, technical lead, and primary developer of the Maximo Integration Tool (MIT), a C#/.NET and Angular application that provides gas engineers with a simplified interface to manage gas assets and run engineering evaluations required for regulatory compliance. ● Modernized MIT from .NET Core 2 to .NET 8 to meet updated security requirements and platform standards, enabling support for two additional asset types and improving long-term maintainability. ● Upgraded MIT to integrate Entity Framework and support IBM Maximo Application Suite (MAS) 9, ensuring compatibility with Ameren’s upcoming asset management platform upgrade and reduce middleware costs ● Developed automation using PowerShell, AutoIT, and C# to streamline internal operational processes, including reducing a 30+ step field device build workflow to roughly 12 steps. ● Built PowerShell automation to package and prepare MIT deployments, improving build consistency and reducing manual release effort. ● Owned, maintained, and enhanced several internal tools, including Maximo Support Center, Cntrl-E, and The Completion Forms Editor, collaborating with product owners and engineers to deliver improvements to operational processes. ● Served as a subject matter expert for Windows configuration and SCCM operations. ● Mentored two junior developers through building a GUI-based editor allowing business users to configure completion forms without editing spreadsheets, reducing configuration errors and improving usability for non-technical users. ● Rebuilt and took ownership of the integration between the mainframe terminal and the field map application using C# .Net Framework, EntityFramework, SQLite geodatabases, and Internal Application APIs/Deeplinks. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.
